## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance rebounded after a dip, with GrowthX content reaching 36K+ impressions and 129 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Content refresh project initiated with prioritized list for updates](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Zuplo's AEO traffic increased by 40% over the last two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Focus on transactional content and AEO optimization for commercial queries](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Backlink quality and domain authority remain areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [GrowthX content jumped to over 36K impressions and 129 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Overall site performance: 77K impressions, 240 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [CTR slightly down due to increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [One day saw a peak of 70K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### Content Refresh Project

  - [Prioritized list created for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Criteria include metrics, age, and potential for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Adrian to review and adjust priorities](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Workflow to be determined for incorporating refreshes (e.g., 2 refreshes per week)](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### API Programmatic Project

### AEO Performance

  - [Zuplo's AEO traffic increased by \~40% over two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Now at \~160 Answer Engine visits, up from \~100](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Focus on transactional queries and commercial intent](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Two interested customers found Zuplo through Claude and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

### Transactional Content Strategy

  - [Mark topics in Content OS for direct comparison tools](https://fathom.video/share/f-1Ge8whzzzz1eUTiWjXhoyi3-Fwn3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
